# Pull Request Summary

## Team
**Defect Avengers** 🛡️

---

## PR Title
**Example:** `QA: Add login validation test cases`

> GitHub automatically generates the PR number after creation.

---

## Type of Change

- [ ] New Test Case
- [ ] Test Case Update
- [ ] Bug Fix
- [ ] Framework Enhancement
- [ ] Report Enhancement
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation Update

---

## Module / Feature Tested

- [ ] Login
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] User Management
- [ ] Course Management
- [ ] Assessment
- [ ] Reports
- [ ] Other: __________

---

## Test Coverage

Describe the scenarios covered in this PR.

**Example:**

- Verified valid login functionality
- Verified invalid login error message
- Verified successful dashboard navigation after login

---

## Execution Details

| Item | Details |
|------|---------|
| **Team** | Defect Avengers |
| **Framework** | Playwright + Cucumber BDD + TypeScript |
| **Browser** | Chromium |
| **Environment** | QA |
| **Execution Type** | Smoke / Regression |
| **Command Used** | `npm run test:qa` |

---

## Test Result

- [ ] Passed
- [ ] Failed
- [ ] Partially Passed
- [ ] Not Executed

---

## Evidence

Attach the following if applicable:

- Execution screenshots
- Playwright HTML Report
- Cucumber HTML Report
- Allure Report
- Execution logs

---

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project standards
- [ ] Feature file is updated
- [ ] Step definitions are implemented
- [ ] Page Object methods are reusable
- [ ] No hardcoded test data
- [ ] Constants are used wherever applicable
- [ ] Tests executed successfully in QA environment
- [ ] HTML report generated successfully
- [ ] Allure report generated successfully (if applicable)
- [ ] No unwanted console logs or commented code
- [ ] Code reviewed before creating PR
- [ ] PR is ready for review



**Team:** **Defect Avengers** 🛡️
